steps.title: Identify the given information
steps.content: We are given a constant production rate of 60 items per hour and a time period of 3 hours. We need to find the total number of items produced.

steps.title: Apply the rate formula to find total production
steps.content:
Substituting our values into the rate formula:

$$60 \text{ items/hour} \times 3 \text{ hours} = 180 \text{ items}$$

The mechanical device will produce 180 items in 3 hours.
